sentences.sentence: For many environmentalists, the world seems to be getting warmer.
sentences.translation: 在许多环保人士看来，全球似乎正在变暖。
difficult_points: For many environmentalists 表示判断所依据的观察视角。
seem to be doing 表示某种正在发生但带有判断色彩的趋势。

sentences.sentence: As the nearest country of South Polar Region, New Zealand has maintained an upward trend in its average temperature in the past few years.
sentences.translation: 作为距离南极地区最近的国家，新西兰过去几年的平均气温一直呈上升趋势。

structure.text: As the nearest country of South Polar Region
has maintained an upward trend in its average temperature

difficult_points: As 引出新西兰的地理身份背景。
has maintained 使用现在完成时，强调趋势从过去持续至今。

sentences.sentence: However, the temperature in New Zealand will go up 4oC in the next century while the polar region will go up more than 6oC.
sentences.translation: 然而，新西兰气温在下个世纪将上升4摄氏度，而极地地区将上升6摄氏度以上。

structure.text: the temperature in New Zealand will go up 4oC in the next century
while the polar region will go up more than 6oC

difficult_points: while 在此表示两地升温幅度的对比。
4oC 和 6oC 是源文对 4°C 和 6°C 的异常写法，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: The different pictures of temperature stem from its surrounding ocean which acts like the air conditioner.
sentences.translation: 这种不同的气温表现源于新西兰周围的海洋，海洋像空调一样发挥作用。

structure.text: which acts like the air conditioner

difficult_points: pictures 在此不是图片，而是不同的温度状况。
which 指 surrounding ocean，说明海洋具有调节气温的作用。

sentences.sentence: Thus New Zealand is comparatively fortunate.
sentences.translation: 因此，相比之下新西兰较为幸运。
difficult_points: Thus 承接海洋缓和升温的原因并引出结论。
comparatively 表明“幸运”是相对于极地地区而言。

sentences.sentence: Scientifically speaking, this temperature phenomenon in New Zealand originated from what researchers call "SAM" (Southern Annular Mode), which refers to the wind belt that circles the Southern Oceans including New Zealand and Antarctica.
sentences.translation: 从科学角度说，新西兰的这种气温现象源于研究人员所称的“SAM”（南半球环状模态），它指环绕包括新西兰和南极洲在内的南大洋的风带。

structure.text: this temperature phenomenon in New Zealand originated from what researchers call "SAM" (Southern Annular Mode)
which refers to the wind belt that circles the Southern Oceans including New Zealand and Antarctica

difficult_points: what researchers call SAM 是融合关系结构，整体作 from 的宾语。
which 指 SAM；其中 that 又引导定语从句修饰 wind belt。

sentences.sentence: Yet recent work has revealed that changes in SAM in New Zealand have resulted in a weakening of moisture during the summer, and more rainfall in other seasons.
sentences.translation: 然而，近期研究表明，新西兰 SAM 的变化导致夏季水分减少，而其他季节降雨增多。

structure.text: that changes in SAM in New Zealand have resulted in a weakening of moisture during the summer, and more rainfall in other seasons

difficult_points: that 引导 revealed 的宾语从句。
a weakening of moisture 与 more rainfall 是 resulted in 后的并列结果。

sentences.sentence: A bigger problem may turn out to be heavier droughts for agricultural activities because of more water loss from soil, resulting in poorer harvest before winter when the rainfall arrive too late to rescue.
sentences.translation: 更大的问题可能是，土壤水分流失加剧会使农业遭遇更严重的干旱，造成冬季前收成变差，而那时降雨来得太晚，已无法挽救作物。

structure.text: A bigger problem may turn out to be heavier droughts for agricultural activities
because of more water loss from soil
resulting in poorer harvest before winter
when the rainfall arrive too late to rescue

difficult_points: turn out to be 表示最终呈现为某种结果。
resulting in 的逻辑主语是前面整种干旱局面。
rainfall arrive 主谓不一致且 rescue 缺宾语，属于源文异常，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Among all the calamities posed be drought, moisture deficit ranks the first.
sentences.translation: 在干旱造成的所有灾害中，水分亏缺位居首位。

structure.text: Among all the calamities posed be drought

difficult_points: Among... 限定排名所比较的范围。
posed be 很可能是 posed by 的源文错误，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Moisture deficit is the gap between the water plants need during the growing season and the water the earth can offer.
sentences.translation: 水分亏缺是指生长季节植物所需水量与土壤所能提供水量之间的差额。

structure.text: between the water plants need during the growing season and the water the earth can offer

difficult_points: between... and... 界定 gap 两端的水量。
plants need 与 the earth can offer 都是省略关系代词的定语从句，分别修饰 water。

sentences.sentence: Measures of moisture deficit were at their highest since the 1970s in New Zealand.
sentences.translation: 新西兰的水分亏缺指标达到20世纪70年代以来的最高水平。
difficult_points: at their highest 表示指标处于最高值。
since the 1970s 给出比较最高值所覆盖的时间范围。

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile, ecological analyses clearly show moisture deficit is imposed at different growth stage of crops.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，生态分析清楚表明，作物不同生长阶段都会承受水分亏缺。

structure.text: moisture deficit is imposed at different growth stage of crops

difficult_points: show 后省略了宾语从句引导词 that。
is imposed 使用被动语态；stage 应为复数 stages，属于源文异常。

sentences.sentence: If moisture deficit occurs around a crucial growth stage, it will cause about 22% reduction in grain yield as opposed to moisture deficit at vegetative phase.
sentences.translation: 如果水分亏缺发生在关键生长阶段，与营养生长阶段的水分亏缺相比，粮食产量将减少约22%。

structure.text: If moisture deficit occurs around a crucial growth stage
it will cause about 22% reduction in grain yield
as opposed to moisture deficit at vegetative phase

difficult_points: it 指代条件从句中的 moisture deficit。
as opposed to 引出关键阶段与营养生长阶段的对比。

sentences.sentence: Global warming is not only affecting agriculture production.
sentences.translation: 全球变暖影响的不只是农业生产。
difficult_points: not only 在此预告影响范围还包括下文其他领域。
agriculture production 是源文用法，语义上指 agricultural production。

sentences.sentence: When scientists say the country's snow pack and glaciers are melting at an alarming rate due to global warming, the climate is putting another strain on the local places.
sentences.translation: 科学家指出该国积雪和冰川正因全球变暖以惊人速度融化，这种气候变化也给当地带来了另一重压力。

structure.text: When scientists say the country's snow pack and glaciers are melting at an alarming rate due to global warming
is putting another strain on the local places

difficult_points: say 后省略 that，其宾语从句主语是 snow pack and glaciers。
at an alarming rate 表示融化速度令人担忧。
put a strain on 表示给某对象造成压力。

sentences.sentence: For example, when the development of global warming is accompanied by the falling snow line, the local skiing industry comes into a crisis.
sentences.translation: 例如，当全球变暖的发展伴随着雪线上升时，当地滑雪业便会陷入危机。

structure.text: when the development of global warming is accompanied by the falling snow line
the local skiing industry comes into a crisis

difficult_points: when 引导气候变化与产业危机发生的时间关系。
falling snow line 字面为雪线下降，但下文说 snow line may move up，源文表意存在矛盾，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: The snow line may move up as the temperature goes up, and then the snow at the bottom will melt earlier.
sentences.translation: 随着气温升高，雪线可能上移，较低处的积雪也会更早融化。

structure.text: The snow line may move up
and then the snow at the bottom will melt earlier

difficult_points: as 表示两种变化同步发生，可译为“随着”。
and then 引出雪线上移后的进一步结果。

sentences.sentence: Fortunately, it is going to be favorable for the local skiing industry to tide over tough periods since the quantities of snowfall in some areas are more likely to increase.
sentences.translation: 幸运的是，由于某些地区的降雪量更可能增加，这将有利于当地滑雪业渡过艰难时期。

structure.text: it is going to be favorable for the local skiing industry to tide over tough periods
since the quantities of snowfall in some areas are more likely to increase

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，后面的不定式短语表达具体有利结果。
since 在此引导原因从句，而非表示“自从”。

sentences.sentence: What is the reaction of glacier region?
sentences.translation: 冰川地区会作出怎样的反应？
difficult_points: What 提问的是 reaction 的具体内容。
glacier region 前缺冠词或复数标记，属于源文表达，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: The climate change can be reflected in the glacier region in southern New Zealand or land covered by ice and snow.
sentences.translation: 气候变化可以在新西兰南部的冰川地区，也就是冰雪覆盖的土地上体现出来。

structure.text: in the glacier region in southern New Zealand or land covered by ice and snow

difficult_points: can be reflected 是被动语态，表示气候变化的影响能从当地看出来。
land covered by ice and snow 是对 glacier region 的替换说明，covered... 为过去分词后置修饰。

sentences.sentence: The reaction of a glacier to a climatic change involves a complex chain of processes.
sentences.translation: 冰川对气候变化的反应涉及一系列复杂过程。

structure.text: The reaction of a glacier to a climatic change

difficult_points: of a glacier 表示反应主体，to a climatic change 表示反应对象。
a chain of 强调多个过程前后关联。

sentences.sentence: Over time periods of years to several decades, cumulative changes in mass balance cause volume and thickness changes, which will affect the flow of ice via altered internal deformation and bas al sliding.
sentences.translation: 在数年至数十年的时间尺度上，质量平衡的累积变化会引起冰川体积和厚度变化，进而通过改变内部形变和基底滑动影响冰流。

structure.text: Over time periods of years to several decades
cumulative changes in mass balance cause volume and thickness changes
which will affect the flow of ice via altered internal deformation and bas al sliding

difficult_points: which 指前面的 volume and thickness changes。
via 引出影响冰流的机制。
bas al 是 basal 被错误拆开的源文异常，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: This dynamic reaction finally leads to glacier length changes, the advance or retreat of glacier tongues.
sentences.translation: 这种动态反应最终导致冰川长度变化，也就是冰舌前进或后退。

structure.text: the advance or retreat of glacier tongues

difficult_points: the advance or retreat... 是 glacier length changes 的同位解释。
glacier tongue 指冰川向低处伸出的狭长末端，即冰舌。

sentences.sentence: Undoubtedly, glacier mass balance is a more direct signal of annual atmospheric conditions.
sentences.translation: 毫无疑问，冰川质量平衡是反映年度大气状况的更直接指标。

structure.text: is a more direct signal of annual atmospheric conditions

difficult_points: Undoubtedly 表明作者对判断的高度确定性。
signal of 表示能够反映某种状况的指标。

sentences.sentence: The latest research result of National Institute of Water and Atmospheric (NIWA) Research shows that glaciers line keeps moving up because of the impacts of global warming.
sentences.translation: 新西兰国家水资源与大气研究所（NIWA）的最新研究结果显示，受全球变暖影响，冰川线持续上移。

structure.text: The latest research result of National Institute of Water and Atmospheric (NIWA) Research shows
that glaciers line keeps moving up
because of the impacts of global warming

difficult_points: that 引导 shows 的宾语从句。
keeps moving 强调上移持续发生。
glaciers line 及机构名称存在源文语法异常，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Further losses of ice can be reflected in Mt. Cook Region.
sentences.translation: 冰量的进一步损失可以从库克山地区的情况中体现出来。
difficult_points: Mt. 是 Mount 的缩写，句中句点不是句末。
can be reflected in 表示某种变化能够从特定地区观察到。

sentences.sentence: By 1996, a 14 km long sector of the glacier had melted down forming a melt lake (Hooker Lake) with a volume.
sentences.translation: 到1996年，冰川中一段长14公里的区域已经融化，形成了一个冰川融水湖（胡克湖），但原文未给出其容积数值。

structure.text: a 14 km long sector of the glacier had melted down
forming a melt lake (Hooker Lake) with a volume

difficult_points: By 1996 与过去完成时 had melted 搭配，表示截至该时点已完成。
forming... 是结果状语。
with a volume 后缺少具体数值，是源文残缺，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Melting of the glacier front at a rate of 40 m/yr will cause the glacier to retreat at a rather uniform rate.
sentences.translation: 冰川前缘以每年40米的速度融化，将使冰川以相当稳定的速度后退。

structure.text: Melting of the glacier front at a rate of 40 m/yr
to retreat at a rather uniform rate

difficult_points: Melting 是动名词，整个短语作主语。
cause the glacier to retreat 是宾语加不定式补足语。

sentences.sentence: Therefore, the lake will continue to grow until it reaches the glacier bed.
sentences.translation: 因此，这个湖将继续扩大，直到抵达冰川河床。

structure.text: the lake will continue to grow
until it reaches the glacier bed

difficult_points: Therefore 承接冰川持续后退所产生的结果。
until 引导湖泊持续扩大的终点条件。

sentences.sentence: A direct result of the melting glaciers is the change of high tides the serves the main factor for sea level rise.
sentences.translation: 冰川融化的一个直接结果是高潮位发生变化，而这成为海平面上升的主要因素。

structure.text: A direct result of the melting glaciers
is the change of high tides
the serves the main factor for sea level rise

difficult_points: 主干是 A direct result... is the change...。
the serves 很可能是 that serves 的源文错误，原意为修饰 high tides 的定语从句。

sentences.sentence: The trend of sea level rise will bring a threat to the groundwater system for its hyper-saline groundwater and then pose a possibility to decrease the agricultural production.
sentences.translation: 海平面上升趋势会因地下水盐度过高而威胁地下水系统，进而可能导致农业产量下降。

structure.text: The trend of sea level rise
will bring a threat to the groundwater system
and then pose a possibility to decrease the agricultural production

difficult_points: bring a threat to 与 pose a possibility 是同一主语下的并列谓语。
its 的指代和 pose a possibility to decrease 搭配均不自然，属于源文表达，按原文解释其大意。

sentences.sentence: Many experts believe that the best way to counter this trend is to give a longer-term view of sea level change in New Zealand.
sentences.translation: 许多专家认为，应对这一趋势的最佳方式是以更长期的视角看待新西兰海平面的变化。

structure.text: that the best way to counter this trend is to give a longer-term view of sea level change in New Zealand

difficult_points: that 引导 believe 的宾语从句。
to counter this trend 修饰 the best way；to give... 作表语说明具体方式。

sentences.sentence: Indeed, the coastal boundaries need to be upgraded and redefined.
sentences.translation: 确实，沿海边界需要更新并重新划定。

structure.text: need to be upgraded and redefined

difficult_points: Indeed 用于加强并确认前一句提出的长期规划观点。
to be upgraded and redefined 是两个并列的被动动作。

sentences.sentence: There is no doubt that global warming has affected New Zealand in many aspects.
sentences.translation: 毫无疑问，全球变暖已在许多方面影响了新西兰。

structure.text: that global warming has affected New Zealand in many aspects

difficult_points: that 从句说明 doubt 的具体内容。
has affected 使用现在完成时，强调影响已经发生且延续至今。

sentences.sentence: The emphasis on the global warming should be based on the joints efforts of local people and experts who conquer the tough period.
sentences.translation: 应对全球变暖的重点应建立在当地居民与专家共同努力、共渡难关的基础上。

structure.text: The emphasis on the global warming
should be based on the joints efforts of local people and experts

difficult_points: be based on 表示以某事物为基础。
who 修饰 local people and experts。
joints efforts 应为 joint efforts，是源文词形异常。

sentences.sentence: For instance, farmers are taking a long term, multi-generational approach to adjust the breeds and species according to the temperature.
sentences.translation: 例如，农民正采取长期、跨世代的方式，根据气温调整品种和物种。

structure.text: are taking a long term, multi-generational approach
to adjust the breeds and species according to the temperature

difficult_points: to adjust... 是目的状语，说明采取这种方法的目标。
according to 引出调整所依据的气温条件。

sentences.sentence: Agriculturists also find ways to tackle the problems that may bring to the soil.
sentences.translation: 农业专家也在寻找办法，解决那些可能给土壤带来影响的问题。

structure.text: to tackle the problems that may bring to the soil

difficult_points: to tackle... 修饰 ways，说明所寻找办法的用途。
that 从句中 bring 缺少明确宾语或施事，是源文残缺表达，按大意理解。

sentences.sentence: In broad terms, going forward, the systemic resilience that's been going on a long time in the ecosystem will continue.
sentences.translation: 总体而言，展望未来，生态系统中长期存在的系统韧性将继续发挥作用。

structure.text: the systemic resilience that's been going on a long time in the ecosystem

difficult_points: going forward 是插入的时间表达，意为今后。
that 引导定语从句修饰 systemic resilience，has been going on 强调长期持续。

sentences.sentence: How about animals' reaction?
sentences.translation: 那么动物会作何反应呢？
difficult_points: How about 用于转换话题并询问某方面情况。
animals' 是所有格，表示动物作出的反应。

sentences.sentence: Experts have surprisingly realized that animals have unconventional adaptation to global warming.
sentences.translation: 专家惊讶地发现，动物对全球变暖有着不同寻常的适应方式。

structure.text: that animals have unconventional adaptation to global warming

difficult_points: that 引导 realized 的宾语从句。
adaptation to 表示对某种环境变化的适应，源文 adaptation 缺冠词或复数标记。

sentences.sentence: A study has looked at sea turtles on a few northern beaches in New Zealand and it is very interesting to find that sea turtles can become male or female according to the temperature.
sentences.translation: 一项研究考察了新西兰北部几处海滩上的海龟，并有趣地发现，海龟会根据温度发育为雄性或雌性。

structure.text: A study has looked at sea turtles on a few northern beaches in New Zealand
and it is very interesting to find
that sea turtles can become male or female according to the temperature

difficult_points: 第二个 it 是形式主语，真正主语是 to find...。
that 从句是 find 的宾语，according to the temperature 说明性别形成的条件。

sentences.sentence: Further researches will try to find out how rising temperatures would affect the ratio of sex reversal in their growth.
sentences.translation: 后续研究将努力弄清气温上升会如何影响其成长过程中的性别转换比例。

structure.text: how rising temperatures would affect the ratio of sex reversal in their growth

difficult_points: how 引导 find out 的宾语从句，并在从句中作方式状语。
their 指海龟；research 通常不可数，researches 是源文用法。

sentences.sentence: Clearly, the temperature of the nest plays a vital role in the sexes of the baby turtles.
sentences.translation: 显然，巢穴温度对幼龟的性别起着关键作用。

structure.text: in the sexes of the baby turtles

difficult_points: Clearly 表明这是由前述研究得出的明确结论。
play a vital role in 表示对结果具有关键影响。

sentences.sentence: Tackling the problems of global warming is never easy in New Zealand, because records show the slow process of global warming may have a different impact on various regions.
sentences.translation: 在新西兰，应对全球变暖问题从来都不容易，因为记录显示，全球变暖的缓慢进程可能对不同地区产生不同影响。

structure.text: Tackling the problems of global warming
is never easy in New Zealand
because records show the slow process of global warming may have a different impact on various regions

difficult_points: Tackling... 是动名词短语作主语。
because 引导原因从句，其中 show 后省略 that。
have an impact on 是固定搭配，表示对某对象产生影响。

sentences.sentence: For New Zealand, the emission of carbon dioxide only accounts for 0.5% of the world's total, which has met the governmental standard.
sentences.translation: 就新西兰而言，其二氧化碳排放量仅占全球总量的0.5%，符合政府标准。

structure.text: the emission of carbon dioxide only accounts for 0.5% of the world's total
which has met the governmental standard

difficult_points: account for 表示某一数值在总量中所占比例。
which 指前面0.5%的排放占比这一情况。

sentences.sentence: However, New Zealand's effort counts only a tip of the iceberg.
sentences.translation: 然而，新西兰的努力只是冰山一角。

structure.text: counts only a tip of the iceberg

difficult_points: However 转折说明单个国家的努力相对于全球问题仍很有限。
a tip of the iceberg 是源文形式，常见习语为 the tip of the iceberg。

sentences.sentence: So far, global warming has been a world issue that still hangs in an ambiguous future.
sentences.translation: 到目前为止，全球变暖一直是一个全球性问题，其未来走向仍不明朗。

structure.text: that still hangs in an ambiguous future

difficult_points: So far 与现在完成时 has been 搭配，表示状态持续至今。
that 修饰 a world issue；hangs in an ambiguous future 是源文不自然表达，意指未来仍不确定。
